title: Stakeholder Outcomes, Owner Authorization, Ethics, and Evidence · Contract Lens: Owner Authorization
summary: A request to audit a public website names pages to collect but no owner, user decision, permitted purpose, stop contact, privacy boundary, or proof that findings are useful. Predict authorization, URL identity, runtime admission, Promise ownership, resource bounds, accessibility impact, failure, and evidence before reading the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the crawler ts owner authorization increment in authorized inclusive site-audit charter. Learners progress through pred…
objectives: Record who controls each target, permitted identities, paths, methods, times, data uses, and revocation contact before any automated request.
Define stakeholder, affected users, decision, site population, success, failure harm, and observable value before choosing crawler features.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
